name: Poll
description: This object contains information about a poll.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique poll identifier

fields.name: question
fields.description: Poll question, 1-300 characters

fields.name: question_entities
fields.description: Special entities that appear in the question. Currently, only custom emoji entities are allowed in poll questions

fields.name: options
fields.description: List of poll options

fields.name: total_voter_count
fields.description: Total number of users that voted in the poll

fields.name: is_closed
fields.description: True, if the poll is closed

fields.name: is_anonymous
fields.description: True, if the poll is anonymous

fields.name: type
fields.description: Poll type, currently can be “regular” or “quiz”

fields.name: allows_multiple_answers
fields.description: True, if the poll allows multiple answers

fields.name: allows_revoting
fields.description: True, if the poll allows to change the chosen answer options

fields.name: members_only
fields.description: True if voting is limited to users who have been members of the chat where the poll was originally sent for more than 24 hours

fields.name: country_codes
fields.description: A list of two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes indicating the countries from which users can vote in the poll. The country code “FT” is used for users with anonymous numbers. If omitted, then users from any country can participate in the poll.

fields.name: correct_option_ids
fields.description: Array of 0-based identifiers of the correct answer options. Available only for polls in quiz mode which are closed or were sent (not forwarded) by the bot or to the private chat with the bot.

fields.name: explanation
fields.description: Text that is shown when a user chooses an incorrect answer or taps on the lamp icon in a quiz-style poll, 0-200 characters

fields.name: explanation_entities
fields.description: Special entities like usernames, URLs, bot commands, etc. that appear in the explanation

fields.name: explanation_media
fields.description: Media added to the quiz explanation

fields.name: open_period
fields.description: Amount of time in seconds the poll will be active after creation

fields.name: close_date
fields.description: Point in time (Unix timestamp) when the poll will be automatically closed

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of the poll; for polls inside the Message object only

fields.name: description_entities
fields.description: Special entities like usernames, URLs, bot commands, etc. that appear in the description

fields.name: media
fields.description: Media added to the poll description; for polls inside the Message object only
